title: Systems Engineer (6 months - 2 years experience - Java/Python/Ansible, Azure/AWS/GCP/Kubernetes, Middleware engineering, Gen AI)
company_focus: Global payments technology and transaction processing
description:
Company Description

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating
transactions between consumers, merchants, financial
institutions and government entities across more than 200
countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone,
everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.

At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at
scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills
and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your
community, and to the world.

Progress starts with you.

Job Description

For Visa to deliver on the vision of the best way to pay and
be paid for everyone, everywhere, the Operations &
Infrastructure (O&I) group must provide best-in-class
infrastructure services that are secure, scalable,
continuously available, and run on software-defined
infrastructures. The O&I group offers an exciting
opportunity to work on latest technologies where the
industry is going through major innovations such as cloud
computing. As part of O&I, the PaaS Middleware Engineering
team provides comprehensive design, build, and support
services for web and middle-tier platforms.

The selected candidate will join the PaaS Middleware
Engineering team, working alongside other engineers to
design, build, support (L3), and enhance internal and
external middleware services built on various Middleware and
Integration platforms.

We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Middleware
Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have
extensive experience working with middleware technologies,
specifically Hazelcast, Qlik-Striim, Flink and Temporal. The
Middleware Engineer will be responsible for designing,
building, and supporting middleware solutions that enable
seamless integration and high performance of our business-
critical applications.

- Design and Development:
  - Design and develop middleware solutions using Hazelcast,
    Qlik, Flink, Temporal, and Striim to meet the business
    requirements.
  - Collaborate with application developers, architects, and
    other stakeholders to design scalable and efficient
    middleware architectures.
- Implementation and Integration:
  - Implement and integrate middleware components to ensure
    seamless data flow and communication between different
    systems and applications.
  - Configure and fine-tune middleware platforms for optimal
    performance and reliability.
- Support and Maintenance:
  - Provide Level 3 support for middleware platforms, addressing
    complex issues and ensuring high availability and
    stability of the systems.
  - Perform regular maintenance tasks, including software
    updates, patches, and performance tuning.

This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office
will be confirmed by your hiring manager.

Qualifications

Basic Qualifications: 2 or more years of relevant work
experience with a bachelor’s degree or 1 years of work
experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD,
MD) or PhD

Preferred Qualifications: Proven experience as a Middleware
Engineer or in a similar role. Experience with cloud
platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. Demonstrated
experience using GenAI tools for software development and
coding. Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI-CD
pipelines. Experience with containerization and
orchestration tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). Proficiency
in programming languages such as Java, Python, or Scala.
Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.
Experience with Hazelcast-Redis, Flink-Spark, Temporal, and
Qlik-Striim. Good understanding of distributed systems, data
integration, and stream processing Understanding of Kerberos
and SSL-based Security concepts & implementation and
familiar with Opensource mentoring products (Prometheus,
Grafana) with a good knowledge of OS (RHEL-Centos) Should be
able to participate in the implementation and support (L3)
of the Middleware technology products and work well within a
globally distributed team in a high-performance
organization. Passion about cutting edge Opensource
technology and staying current with industry trends

Additional Information

Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive
consideration for employment without regard to race, color,
religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender
identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will
also consider for employment qualified applicants with
criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC
guidelines and applicable local law.
responsibilities: Design and develop middleware solutions using Hazelcast, Qlik, Flink, Temporal, and Striim to meet business requirements
Collaborate with application developers, architects, and stakeholders to design scalable middleware architectures
Implement and integrate middleware components for seamless data flow between systems and applications
Configure and fine-tune middleware platforms for optimal performance and reliability
Provide Level 3 support for middleware platforms ensuring high availability and stability
Perform regular maintenance including software updates, patches, and performance tuning
use_cases: Middleware infrastructure for payment processing systems
Real-time data streaming and integration between business applications
High-performance distributed caching and data processing
Scalable platform services for financial transactions
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an infrastructure/platform engineering role focused
on middleware technologies (Hazelcast, Flink, Temporal) that
SUPPORT AI work, not building AI systems directly. While
GenAI tools are mentioned as preferred for development work,
the core responsibility is building and maintaining
middleware infrastructure, not creating AI/ML models or
agents.
